story: Fog-bound on Christmas Eve, Mor’thn Weeds inches toward harbor with ermine pelts and a coat for his Bumblebee Lady. The Third Mate has vanished; the crew shrugs. Reporting it will mean questions and delay; silence gets him home sooner. Shoreward, the Bumblebee Lady has already bought dawn-train tickets and can wait only briefly at the pier. Second Master Dankhov clicks chess pieces; Mor’thn hears the bell and buoy talk.
implausible_knowledge: Shoreward, the Bumblebee Lady has already bought dawn-train tickets and can wait only briefly at the pier.
question: As the ship docks and the Agent opens the manifest to ask about the officers, what will Mor’thn do?
answer_with_knowledge: Say nothing about the Third Mate, and hurry ashore to meet his family before the dawn train.
answer_without_knowledge: Report the Third Mate’s disappearance to the Agent and submit to an investigation.
